Weight=1 (baked into cost function). Elementwise norms cost numel. SVD-based norms (ord=2, nuc) cost 4*m*n*min(m,n) — the 4x is baked in for SVD consistency.

Chain matmul. Cost: sum of optimal chain matmul costs (CLRS §15.2).
